scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (time_entries, projects, clients, workspace_users, organization_users). Toggl's write endpoints (create/update/delete time entry, project, client) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: authenticated-user profile introspection, used only by check, not a syncable object stream

legacy connector never implemented time entry mutation; Pass B capability expansion
